steps.message: Revoke and invalidate the session ID 'FIXED_ID_123' immediately in the session manager to prevent unauthorized access.

Modify the authentication logic to ensure the application issues a fresh session token following a successful login (WAHH 5.8.1). Verify that the application does not accept invented tokens provided by the user (WAHH 5.8.3).
Update web server configuration to set cookie domain and path scope as restrictively as possible. Ensure 'Secure' and 'HttpOnly' flags are applied to all session cookies.
Scan system logs and diagnostic logs for other instances of session tokens appearing in URLs or plain text logs (WAHH 5.5).
Review the session management life cycle audit and confirm that remediation steps satisfy WAHH 5.6 (mapping tokens to sessions) and 5.7 (session termination).
